info.title: EDCOCR API
info.description: REST API for forensic-grade document OCR processing.

post.description: Submit multiple documents for OCR processing as a batch.

get.description: List batches with optional status filter and pagination.
Get status and progress of a batch.

delete.description: Cancel all running jobs in a batch.

post.description: Retry all failed or cancelled jobs in a batch.
Submit a document for OCR processing.

get.description: List jobs with optional status/batch filter and pagination.
Get status and progress of a specific job.
Get result metadata and artifact links for a completed job.
Download a specific result artifact (pdf, text, structure).

post.description: Retry a failed or cancelled job by re-submitting with the same source.

get.description:
Stream job progress via Server-Sent Events (SSE).

Sends events for status changes, page completion, and final result.

Event types:
- **status** -- emitted when job status changes (submitted, processing, etc.)
- **progress** -- periodic progress with pages completed / total pages
- **result** -- emitted when job completes successfully
- **error** -- emitted on job failure or stream error
- **done** -- final event, stream closes after this
Return pipeline health status.
Consolidated health check with subsystem probing.
List all available transform operations with metadata.
Get metadata for a specific transform operation.

post.description:
Execute a transform operation on a server-side file.

This endpoint performs synchronous execution suitable for short operations.
For long-running transforms, consider using the job queue instead.

get.description: List all available stamp operations with metadata.
Get metadata for a specific stamp operation.

post.description:
Execute a stamp operation on a server-side PDF file.

This endpoint performs synchronous execution suitable for short operations.
For long-running stamping, consider using the job queue instead.

get.description:
Replay stored events for a job.

Returns a JSON array of events in chronological order.
If ``since_id`` is provided, only events occurring after that
event are returned (useful for reconnecting clients).

parameters.name: since_id

schema.description: Return events after this event ID
schema.title: Since Id

parameters.description: Return events after this event ID

get.description:
List webhook dead-letter queue entries.

Returns entries in reverse chronological order (most recent first).
Get a single DLQ entry by ID.

post.description:
Retry a failed webhook delivery from the dead-letter queue.

Re-delivers the original payload to the webhook URL and marks
the DLQ entry as retried.

get.description:
List all output artifacts produced for a job.

Returns a manifest with metadata for each artifact including type,
filename, relative path, size, and schema version.

Download a specific output artifact for a job.

Returns the file content directly. JSON sidecar files are returned
with ``application/json`` content type; PDFs as ``application/pdf``;
text as ``text/plain``.

List all available output schema definitions.

Returns the output type name and schema version for each defined
schema in the ``schemas/`` package.

Get the JSON Schema definition for a specific output type.

Returns the raw JSON Schema content.

post.description:
Search documents using semantic understanding via VLM.

Sends the query to the configured VLM inference server and returns
ranked results with relevance scores and bounding boxes.

Analyze document pages using a VLM for entity extraction and summarization.

Sends pages (text and optional images) to the VLM inference server
for deep document understanding.

get.description:
Check VLM gateway health and connectivity.

Returns whether the VLM feature is enabled and whether the inference
server is reachable. Does not require authentication to allow
monitoring probes.

List review queue items with optional filtering.

By default returns pending items. Use the ``status`` parameter to
filter by a specific status (pending, approved, rejected, reprocess).
Return aggregate review queue statistics.
List all configured exception routing rules and their status.
Get details for a specific review item.

post.description: Submit a review decision (approve, reject, or request reprocessing).

get.description:
Search indexed entities across all processed documents.

Supports filtering by entity type, text content, job ID, and
minimum confidence. Results are ordered by most recently indexed.

parameters.name: type

schema.description: Filter by entity type (e.g. PERSON, DATE)
schema.title: Type

parameters.description: Filter by entity type (e.g. PERSON, DATE)

get.description:
Search indexed key-value extractions across all processed documents.

Supports filtering by field name, value content, job ID, and
minimum confidence. Results are ordered by most recently indexed.

parameters.name: field

schema.description: Filter by field name (e.g. invoice_number, date)
schema.title: Field

parameters.description: Filter by field name (e.g. invoice_number, date)

get.description:
Return entity and extraction index statistics.

Includes total counts, unique types/fields, and number of
indexed jobs.
Return Prometheus text-format metrics from the API process.
List all tenants, optionally filtered by status.

schema.title: Response Admin List Tenants Api V1 Admin Tenants Get

get.description: Get tenant details including current usage.

delete.description:
Soft-delete a tenant: marks status as 'deleted' and revokes all API keys.

Data is preserved for audit trail.  Requires platform admin permission.

post.description: Suspend a tenant (all API keys become inactive).

delete.description:
Hard-delete a tenant and all associated data (cascading cleanup).

Permanently removes the tenant record along with all Jobs, UsageRecords,
and TenantApiKeys.  Returns counts of deleted rows.

Blocked when ``LITIGATION_HOLD`` environment variable is set to a truthy
value (``1``, ``true``, or ``yes``).

Requires platform admin permission.

get.description:
Return a cost report compatible with the standalone cost_tracking.py schema.

Provides a bridge between the database-backed usage system and the
standalone CostTracker format used by cost_tracking.py.

post.description: Create a new API key for a tenant. The raw key is returned only once.

get.description: Get usage report for a tenant (defaults to current month).
Get a rolling tenant SLO snapshot.

put.description:
Set a per-tenant rate limit override.

When configured, this rate limit replaces the global default for all
API requests authenticated with this tenant's API keys.

get.description: Get the current per-tenant rate limit override (or null if unset).

delete.description: Remove a per-tenant rate limit override (reverts to global default).

get.description:
Return a DashboardSnapshot filtered by tenant_id.

Queries the job database for the given tenant within the requested
time window and computes throughput and latency metrics.
Requires both ENABLE_DASHBOARD and ENABLE_MULTITENANCY to be active.

BatchJobSummary.title: BatchJobSummary

BatchProgressInfo.description: Aggregated progress information for a batch.

BatchStatusResponse.description: Full batch status with progress and child job summaries.

BatchSubmitResponse.title: BatchSubmitResponse
BatchSubmitResponse.description: Response returned when a batch is successfully submitted.

files.title: Files
files.description: List of files to upload and process.

source_paths.title: Source Paths
source_paths.description: JSON array string of server-side file paths.

enable_docintel.title: Enable Docintel
enable_docintel.description: Enable structured Document Intelligence extraction (requires GPU).

skip_ocr.title: Skip Ocr
skip_ocr.description: Skip OCR and perform NLP/DocIntel only. Assumes textual input.

processing_timeout_minutes.title: Processing Timeout Minutes
processing_timeout_minutes.description: Custom timeout in minutes for these jobs before they are marked failed.

webhook_url.title: Webhook Url
webhook_url.description: URL to receive a POST request when the batch completes or fails.

webhook_secret.title: Webhook Secret
webhook_secret.description: Secret used to sign the webhook payload (HMAC-SHA256).

source_path.title: Source Path
source_path.description: Path to a file already on the server's NFS/S3 storage. Provide this OR a file upload.

enable_docintel.title: Enable Docintel
enable_docintel.description: Enable structured Document Intelligence extraction (requires GPU).

skip_ocr.title: Skip Ocr
skip_ocr.description: Skip OCR processing and only perform NLP/DocIntel if enabled. Assumes input is already textual.

processing_timeout_minutes.title: Processing Timeout Minutes
processing_timeout_minutes.description: Custom timeout in minutes for this job before it is marked failed.

webhook_url.title: Webhook Url
webhook_url.description: URL to receive a POST request when the job completes or fails.

webhook_secret.title: Webhook Secret
webhook_secret.description: Secret used to sign the webhook payload (HMAC-SHA256).

DetailedHealthResponse.title: DetailedHealthResponse
DetailedHealthResponse.description: Extended health response with subsystem checks.

pages.description: List of page dicts with page_number, text, and optional image_b64.

DocumentAnalysisRequest.description: Request body for VLM document analysis.

ReviewDecisionRequest.title: ReviewDecisionRequest

ReviewQueueResponse.title: ReviewQueueResponse

SchemaListItem.title: SchemaListItem

SchemaListResponse.title: SchemaListResponse

document_id.title: Document Id

max_results.title: Max Results
max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return.

page.title: Page

bbox.title: Bbox
bbox.description: Bounding box [x1, y1, x2, y2] of the matched region.

output_path.title: Output Path

validate_input.title: Validate Input

check_overlap.title: Check Overlap

StampOperationMetadata.description: Metadata about a registered stamp operation.

output_path.title: Output Path
output_path.description: Path where output should be written

validate_input.title: Validate Input

TransformOperationMetadata.description: Metadata about a registered transform operation.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for authentication. Set via OCR_API_KEY environment variable.
